form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 2nd of 8 at Ascot 2yo Swp on April 1 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.6 len behind Rok 'N' Rom carrying 57kg at $4.20. Fitter and the key runner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Was well in the market at debut, 2nd of 8 at Ascot 2yo Swp on April 1 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.6 len behind Rok 'N' Rom carrying 57kg at $4.20. Fitter and the key runner.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming second last of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 7 len behind Dixie Doo carrying 57kg at $41. Last start 2nd in a small field at Pinjarra 2Mdn on April 8 over 1200m, nose behind Axopar with 57kg at $31. Promising effort last time out. Has to be considered on the latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Third-up today. Resuming second last of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 7 len behind Dixie Doo carrying 57kg at $41. Last start 2nd in a small field at Pinjarra 2Mdn on April 8 over 1200m, nose behind Axopar with 57kg at $31. Promising effort last time out. Has to be considered on the latest effort.

form.formComment: At debut, 10th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 5 len behind Dixie Doo carrying 57kg at $11. Top hoop stays aboard and she can improve with the blinkers going on.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). At debut, 10th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 5 len behind Dixie Doo carrying 57kg at $11. Top hoop stays aboard and she can improve with the blinkers going on.

form.formComment: First starter by Thorn Dancer out of Marriwood. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Aided by a nice alley but prepared to risk first time out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Thorn Dancer out of Marriwood. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Aided by a nice alley but prepared to risk first time out.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut 4th of 12 at Ascot Crystal Slipper on November 22 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Beatty carrying 55kg at $17. Went for a spell before returning 3rd of 8 at Ascot 2yo Swp on April 1 over 1200m, slow going 1.4 len behind Rok 'N' Rom with 55kg at $12. Improver who can make the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Third race start. Promising on debut 4th of 12 at Ascot Crystal Slipper on November 22 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Beatty carrying 55kg at $17. Went for a spell before returning 3rd of 8 at Ascot 2yo Swp on April 1 over 1200m, slow going 1.4 len behind Rok 'N' Rom with 55kg at $12. Improver who can make the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride. Raced close to heels over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At very long odds at debut, 8th of 11 at Ascot 2yo Swp on March 14 over 1100m, 8 len behind Jedi Dream carrying 55kg at $61. Last start 8th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 4 len behind Dixie Doo with 55kg at $101. Will need this too.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Third race start today. At very long odds at debut, 8th of 11 at Ascot 2yo Swp on March 14 over 1100m, 8 len behind Jedi Dream carrying 55kg at $61. Last start 8th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 4 len behind Dixie Doo with 55kg at $101. Will need this too.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted inwards behind runners from its wide barrier.

form.formComment: Jumped at very long odds at debut, made some head-way from midfield; 4th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Dixie Doo carrying 55kg at $151. Better for the experience and can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Jumped at very long odds at debut, made some head-way from midfield; 4th of 13 at Belmont Park 2yo 0Mw on March 25 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Dixie Doo carrying 55kg at $151. Better for the experience and can measure up.

form.formComment: Two-year-old filly (Portland Sky - Serene Beauty) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Fifth over 950m in a Lark Hill trial on April 7. Unplaced in recent trials and looks tested.
